title: An Introduction to Geology
description: Defines minerals, describes the basic structure of atoms, and has basic information on elements.

title: Rocks
description: A quick introduction to the basics of rocks and minerals.

title: Rock cycle
description: Describes what the rock cycle is and how it works on a more basic level

title: Superposition
description: Describes the geological principle known as superposition.

title: Mineral Hardness, Cleavage, and Fracture
description: Describes different ways in which you can break minerals.

title: Hardness
description: Describes one of the components that defines the durability of gemstones
